title: ABP v1 Core action envelope (Client -> Host)
description: Core validates only the action envelope. The set of kinds and each kind's `data` schema are defined by the negotiated, pinned World Profile (SPEC/abp-v1.md §5). Hosts MUST re-validate against session capabilities and the current turn's allowed_actions. Fields the profile marks x-abp-trust:client_authored SHOULD pass egress DLP before emission.

kind.description: A key defined by the pinned profile's `actions` map. Unknown kinds MUST be rejected.

data.description: Validated against the pinned profile's actions[kind].data schema (closed, additionalProperties:false).
